list: June 7: Quarterly business meeting after the evening service.
June 27: Men’s Discipleship Breakfast at 8:00 AM hosted by Mark Deaton.
Praise God for a wonderful 2026 VBS! Emerald Crossing was so much fun and a great success because God brought His people together to serve young people. We will finish learning Psalm 23 tonight!
VBS students donated $845.57 to the Carol Bolin Memorial Mission Fund. Praise the Lord!
